options.content:
|Req|Target|Current input|Primary design variable|Verification metric|
|---|---:|---:|---|---|
|Range|${missionKm} km/day|${missionKm}|Gas/H2/Electric split|energy margin kWh|
|Floor thickness|<=${targetFloor} mm|stacked package|SOFC/SSB/LH2/Reformer/Cooling H|mm margin|
|Payload|>=${targetPayload} kg|mass budget|component mass + tanks|kg margin|
|Fleet availability|>=95%|energy/refill|SOFC kW / LH2 kg / electric kWh|availability %|
|Contribution|>=100 index|energy cost|gasJPY/h2JPY/elecJPY + mix|index|

|Subsystem|H|W|D|Performance|Role|KPI affected|
|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|---|---|
|SOFC module|${sofcH}|${sofcW}|${sofcD}|${sofcKw} kW|base-load generation|availability / energy margin|
|SSB pack|${ssbH}|1200|2200|${ssbKwh} kWh|transient + traction support|floor / payload / peak power|
|LH2 tank|${lh2H}|350|1400|${lh2Kg} kg-H2|hydrogen buffer|range / refill risk|
|Reformer|${reformerH}|350|700|gas conversion|city gas use|cost / package|
|Cooling|${coolingH}|500|1400|thermal capacity|durability|uptime|
|Inverter/DC|160|420|650|240 kW|electric conversion|efficiency|

|Item|Formula / input|Value|
|---|---|---:|
|Traction demand|${missionKm} × ${kwhPerKm}|360 kWh/day|
|City gas share|${gasPct}%|198 kWh output|
|Hydrogen share|${h2Pct}%|90 kWh output|
|Electric share|${elecPct}%|72 kWh output|
|Total output|gas + H2 + electric|360 kWh/day|
|Energy margin|supply - demand|0 kWh|
|Daily energy cost|gas + H2 + electric|36,400 JPY|

|Package layer|Height|Allocation logic|
|---|---:|---|
|Base floor / insulation|60|fixed structure|
|SSB pack|${ssbH}|underfloor center|
|LH2 tank|${lh2H}|side/subframe storage|
|SOFC module|${sofcH}|distributed base-load|
|Reformer|${reformerH}|gas conversion module|
|Cooling|${coolingH}|thermal path|
|Routing margin|40|pipe/wire clearance|
|Calculated stack|420|compressed layout result|
|Target floor|${targetFloor}|requirement|
|Margin|+30|OK|

|Variant|Gas|H2|Elec|Floor|Payload|Avail.|Cost/day|Contribution|Decision|
|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|---|
|A Cost min|75|10|15|445|2920|94.2|31,900|111|HOLD: packaging risk|
|B Balanced|${gasPct}|${h2Pct}|${elecPct}|420|3120|95.5|36,400|108|AUTHORIZED|
|C Range priority|40|45|15|465|2860|96.0|48,200|96|HOLD: contribution|
|D Electric support|45|15|40|440|3000|95.0|35,800|106|AUTHORIZED|

|KPI|Requirement|Variant A|Variant B|Variant C|Judge B|
|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|---|
|Floor thickness|<=450|445|420|465|OK|
|Payload|>=3000|2920|3120|2860|OK|
|Fleet availability|>=95%|94.2|95.5|96.0|OK|
|Energy margin|>=0|+2|+0|+5|OK|
|Energy cost/day|min|31,900|36,400|48,200|WATCH|
|Contribution index|>=100|111|108|96|OK|

|Optimization objective|Not selected|Reason|Selected logic|
|---|---|---|---|
|Lowest energy cost|A Cost min|payload/floor margin weak|B Balanced|
|Maximum range|C Range priority|cost and floor risk|B Balanced|
|Maximum electric assist|D Electric support|battery package pressure|B Balanced|
|Best overall|B Balanced|-|floor + payload + availability + contribution|

Decision: choose the variant with positive margins across requirement, packaging, fleet availability, and contribution, not the cheapest energy mix alone.

|Sweep|Input range|Output checked|Pass condition|
|---|---|---|---|
|Energy price sweep|gas/h2/electric unit price|cost / contribution|index >=100|
|Energy mix sweep|gas/h2/electric ratio|cost / floor / range|all margins positive|
|Package height sweep|SOFC/SSB/LH2/reformer/cooling H|floor thickness|<=450 mm|
|Performance sweep|SOFC kW / SSB kWh / LH2 kg|availability / range|>=95%, >=mission|
|Architecture variant sweep|A/B/C/D|decision state|AUTHORIZED only if all gates pass|
